hermes.goal: Beat buy-and-hold (positive alpha vs BTC) while keeping max drawdown under 15% and never risking the mandate on a single trade — capital preservation first. Near-term: prove a sustained, fee-aware, positive out-of-sample edge on the paper trainer over ~90 days before scaling any live capital; grow the live account only on demonstrated alpha.

brain.commentary: The current basket shows flat directional bias with sub‑0.5 conviction and mildly negative composites. Beta and volatility remain elevated, especially for ETH and SOL, while LTC exhibits the weakest composite and most negative alpha, marking it as the most fragile signal. In line with a capital‑preservation stance, we modestly scale back conviction across the board, with a larger pullback on LTC. Monitoring correlation and volatility regimes is advised.
